---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new language feature, opcode, or stdlib addition
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like to see

Brief description of the feature.

## Why

What does this enable? Concrete example of a program you couldn't write today but could write with this feature.

## Suggested design

If you have a specific syntax / opcode / approach in mind, sketch it here. Otherwise leave blank.

## Roadmap awareness

Some features are already planned (see [CHANGELOG.md](../../CHANGELOG.md) and the roadmap in `README.md`):

- Direct F-recursion → planned for `v0.3`
- Floating point f64 → planned for `v0.5`
- Threading → planned for `v0.8`
- Module / import system → planned for `v0.4`
- C FFI → deferred

If your request fits one of these, please mention which one. Otherwise it might be a new entry.
